extra.reason: Swapped @carderne/sandbox-runtime fork for upstream @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime@^0.0.66 across package.json, lockfile, src imports, README, sandbox.json. Dropped fork-only allowBrowserProcess field (agent-browser support). tsc/tests/lint/fmt all pass.
Updated repository.url, homepage, bugs.url to rawenger/pi-sandbox and author to Ryan Wenger. JSON validated.

Fixed: added idempotent lazy `await Settings.init({ cwd })` before both settings.getShellConfig() sites in src/sandbox-runtime.ts (createSandboxedBashOps().exec and runSandboxedUserBash). Root cause: the extension loads its own vendored @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent copy whose global Settings singleton is never initialized, so getShellConfig() threw 'Settings not initialized' for every bash command. Verified via fresh-process subprocess (echo returns output, no error). Added regression test test/sandbox-runtime.test.ts 'runSandboxedUserBash initializes Settings before reading shell config' (subprocess + nonexistent cwd discriminator; proven to fail on unfixed code). fmt/lint/tsc/tests all green.
